heading: Cooperation of other departments and agencies
label: 10249 Cooperation of other departments and agencies
text: Each department, agency, and instrumentality of the United States, including any independent agency, may furnish the Negotiator such information as he determines to be necessary to carry out his functions under this subchapter.
notes: Codificationand added identical sections.Pub. L. 100–202Pub. L. 100–203
